# react-record-webcam

> React hook for webcam and audio recording. Zero dependencies beyond React. TypeScript-first. Multi-device, quality presets, screenshot capture, recording timer, progressive upload.

## Install

```bash
npm install react-record-webcam
```

## Requirements

- React 18+ (uses `useSyncExternalStore`)
- Browser: `MediaRecorder` + `getUserMedia` — Chrome, Firefox, Edge, Safari 14.1+

## Core usage

```tsx
import { useRecordWebcam } from 'react-record-webcam';

// REQUIRED call order: createRecording → openCamera → startRecording → stopRecording
function App() {
  const {
    activeRecordings,
    createRecording,
    openCamera,
    startRecording,
    stopRecording,
    download,
  } = useRecordWebcam();

  const record = async () => {
    const recording = await createRecording(); // always guard: may return undefined
    if (!recording) return;
    await openCamera(recording.id);    // status → OPEN
    await startRecording(recording.id); // status → RECORDING
  };

  return (
    <div>
      <button onClick={record}>Record</button>
      {activeRecordings.map((recording) => (
        <div key={recording.id}>
          {/* webcamRef = live camera preview; previewRef = playback after stop */}
          <video ref={recording.webcamRef} autoPlay muted playsInline />
          <video ref={recording.previewRef} autoPlay loop playsInline />
          <button onClick={() => stopRecording(recording.id)}>Stop</button>
          <button onClick={() => download(recording.id)}>Download</button>
        </div>
      ))}
    </div>
  );
}
```

## Hook signature

```ts
function useRecordWebcam(args?: {
  /**
   * Video/audio track constraints (width, height, frameRate, etc.).
   * These are MediaTrackConstraints — NOT MediaStreamConstraints.
   * Do NOT pass `video: true` or `audio: true` here; both are always requested.
   */
  mediaTrackConstraints?: Partial<MediaTrackConstraints>;
  mediaRecorderOptions?: Partial<MediaRecorderOptions>;
  options?: {
    fileName?: string;    // default: timestamp string
    fileType?: string;    // default: 'webm'
    timeSlice?: number;   // chunk interval in ms; required for onDataAvailable to fire
    maxDuration?: number; // auto-stop after N milliseconds
  };
  quality?: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high' | 'hd'; // overrides track constraints & bitrates
  onStatusChange?: (recordingId: string, oldStatus: Status, newStatus: Status) => void;
  onDataAvailable?: (recordingId: string, chunk: Blob) => void; // requires timeSlice
}): UseRecordWebcam
```

## Return value

| Property | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `activeRecordings` | `Recording[]` | All current recordings |
| `cameraPermission` | `'prompt'\|'granted'\|'denied'\|'unknown'` | Checked without triggering browser prompt |
| `devicesByType` | `{ video: MediaDeviceInfo[], audio: MediaDeviceInfo[] }` | |
| `devicesById` | `Record<string, { label: string, type: string }>` | |
| `error` | `RecordingError \| null` | `{ code, message, recordingId? }` |
| `errorMessage` | `string \| null` | Backward-compat string form of `error` |
| `createRecording` | `(videoId?, audioId?, opts?) => Promise<Recording \| undefined>` | |
| `openCamera` | `(id: string) => Promise<void>` | Must call before startRecording |
| `closeCamera` | `(id: string) => Promise<void>` | Releases camera stream |
| `startRecording` | `(id: string) => Promise<void>` | Requires openCamera first |
| `stopRecording` | `(id: string) => Promise<void>` | `recording.blob` is set after resolves |
| `pauseRecording` | `(id: string) => Promise<void>` | |
| `resumeRecording` | `(id: string) => Promise<void>` | |
| `muteRecording` | `(id: string) => Promise<void>` | Toggles audio mute |
| `cancelRecording` | `(id: string) => Promise<void>` | Cancels and removes recording |
| `captureScreenshot` | `(id: string) => Promise<Blob \| void>` | PNG frame; camera must be OPEN or RECORDING |
| `download` | `(id: string) => Promise<void>` | Triggers file download |
| `getBlob` | `(id: string) => Blob \| undefined` | Get blob without downloading |
| `clearPreview` | `(id: string) => Promise<void>` | Clear preview video and reset |
| `clearAllRecordings` | `() => Promise<void>` | |
| `clearError` | `() => void` | |
| `applyConstraints` | `(id: string, constraints: MediaTrackConstraints) => Promise<void>` | Live camera only |
| `applyRecordingOptions` | `(id: string) => Promise<void>` | Re-apply current options |

## Recording object

```ts
type Recording = {
  id: string;
  status: Status;
  audioOnly: boolean;
  webcamRef: React.RefObject<HTMLVideoElement | null>; // attach to <video> for live preview
  previewRef: React.RefObject<HTMLVideoElement | null>; // attach to <video> for post-stop playback
  blob?: Blob;           // populated after stopRecording resolves
  objectURL: string | null;
  startedAt: number | null;
  pausedAt: number | null;
  totalPausedMs: number;
  isMuted: boolean;
  recorder: MediaRecorder | null; // underlying MediaRecorder instance
};
```

## Status lifecycle

```
INITIAL → OPEN (openCamera) → RECORDING (startRecording) → PAUSED (pauseRecording)
                                                         ↑                        ↓
                                                         └──── resumeRecording ───┘
                                          RECORDING → STOPPED (stopRecording)
                                          Any state → CLOSED (closeCamera)
                                          Any state → ERROR
```

Valid status values: `'INITIAL' | 'OPEN' | 'RECORDING' | 'PAUSED' | 'STOPPED' | 'CLOSED' | 'ERROR'`

## Quality presets

| Preset | Resolution | Video bitrate | Audio bitrate |
|---|---|---|---|
| `low` | 640×480 | 500 kbps | 64 kbps |
| `medium` | 1280×720 | 1.5 Mbps | 128 kbps |
| `high` | 1920×1080 | 3 Mbps | 192 kbps |
| `hd` | 3840×2160 | 8 Mbps | 256 kbps |

Preset overrides both `mediaTrackConstraints` (width/height) and `mediaRecorderOptions` (bitrates). You can still merge custom values — they take precedence.

## Common patterns

### Audio-only recording

```tsx
const recording = await createRecording(undefined, undefined, { audioOnly: true });
await openCamera(recording.id);
await startRecording(recording.id);
```

### Multi-device recording

```tsx
const { devicesByType, createRecording } = useRecordWebcam();
// devicesByType.video and devicesByType.audio are arrays of MediaDeviceInfo
const recording = await createRecording(videoDeviceId, audioDeviceId);
```

### Progressive upload (streaming chunks to server)

```tsx
const recorder = useRecordWebcam({
  options: { timeSlice: 1000 }, // required — chunks fire every 1000ms
  onDataAvailable: (recordingId, chunk) => {
    fetch('/api/upload', { method: 'POST', body: chunk });
  },
});
```

### Recording timer (pause-aware)

```tsx
import { useRecordWebcam, useRecordingTimer } from 'react-record-webcam';

function RecordingView({ recording }) {
  const elapsed = useRecordingTimer(recording); // seconds, pauses correctly
  return <p>{Math.floor(elapsed / 60)}:{String(elapsed % 60).padStart(2, '0')}</p>;
}
```

### Auto-stop after duration

```tsx
useRecordWebcam({ options: { maxDuration: 30000 } }); // auto-stops after 30 s
```

### Screenshot capture

```tsx
const blob = await captureScreenshot(recording.id); // PNG Blob; camera must be open
```

### Read camera permission without prompting

```tsx
const { cameraPermission } = useRecordWebcam();
// 'granted' | 'denied' | 'prompt' | 'unknown' — checked silently on mount
```

## Pitfalls

- **Do NOT** pass `video: true` or `audio: true` to `mediaTrackConstraints`. Both streams are always requested automatically.
- `openCamera` **must** be called before `startRecording`. Calling out of order throws an error.
- `recording.blob` is only set **after** `stopRecording` resolves. Accessing it before gives `undefined`.
- Attach `webcamRef` and `previewRef` to **separate** `<video>` elements. Using the same element causes playback issues.
- `onDataAvailable` only fires when `options.timeSlice` is set.
- For Next.js: the hook is already marked `"use client"` internally — no extra wrapper needed.
- `createRecording` can return `undefined` if device enumeration fails. Always guard the return value.

## All exports

```ts
// Main hook
export { useRecordWebcam } from 'react-record-webcam';
export type { UseRecordWebcam, UseRecordWebcamArgs, Options } from 'react-record-webcam';

// Timer hook
export { useRecordingTimer } from 'react-record-webcam';

// Types
export type { Recording, Status, RecordingError } from 'react-record-webcam';
export type { QualityPreset } from 'react-record-webcam';
export type { CameraPermission } from 'react-record-webcam';

// Constants
export { STATUS, ERROR_MESSAGES } from 'react-record-webcam';

// Advanced / composable hooks (for custom implementations)
export { useCamera } from 'react-record-webcam';
export type { UseCamera } from 'react-record-webcam';
export { useRecorder } from 'react-record-webcam';
export type { UseRecorder } from 'react-record-webcam';
```

## Error codes

```ts
const ERROR_MESSAGES = {
  CODEC_NOT_SUPPORTED: 'CODEC_NOT_SUPPORTED',
  SESSION_EXISTS: 'SESSION_EXISTS',
  NO_RECORDING_WITH_ID: 'NO_RECORDING_WITH_ID',
  NO_USER_PERMISSION: 'NO_USER_PERMISSION',
} as const;
```
